authorship: Original vector compositions authored for the Rodoh local-first cartridge player. No external art, stock imagery, model weights, or third-party source files were incorporated.
license: Project-owned; distributed under the repository license for this runtime use.
releaseBoundary: This pack completes the cartridge-bay environment and foreground framing for the local-first player shell. It does not replace cartridge-owned environments or imply that Rodoh owns the identity of imported worlds.

assets.responsiveIntent: cover crop preserves the central loading dais and leaves the cartridge list readable
vault jambs and status lamps may crop while every import, enter, resume, and remove control remains unobstructed

required: Vite production build resolves both system asset URLs
desktop Chromium renders a readable five-cartridge shelf
mobile Chromium preserves scrolling and minimum touch targets
keyboard focus remains visible above decorative framing
neutral imported cartridges retain their own visual identity after entry
